eql.name: updateStatusIfMatch

sql.name: getOrderStatistics
sql.source: SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_COUNT, COALESCE(SUM(ACTUAL_PRICE), 0) AS TOTAL_AMOUNT, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(ORDER_STATUS AS INT) = 101 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS PENDING_COUNT, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(ORDER_STATUS AS INT) = 201 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS PAID_COUNT, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(ORDER_STATUS AS INT) = 301 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SHIPPED_COUNT, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(ORDER_STATUS AS INT) IN (401, 402) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS COMPLETED_COUNT, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(ORDER_STATUS AS INT) IN (102, 103) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CANCELLED_COUNT FROM litemall_order WHERE CAST(DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND ADD_TIME >= ${startDate} AND ADD_TIME <= ${endDate}

sql.name: getGoodsSalesRanking
sql.source: SELECT og.GOODS_ID AS GOODS_ID, og.GOODS_NAME AS GOODS_NAME, SUM(og.NUMBER) AS SALES_COUNT, SUM(og.PRICE * og.NUMBER) AS SALES_AMOUNT FROM litemall_order_goods og INNER JOIN litemall_order o ON o.ID = og.ORDER_ID WHERE CAST(o.DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND CAST(og.DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND CAST(o.ORDER_STATUS AS INT) NOT IN (102, 103) AND o.ADD_TIME >= ${startDate} AND o.ADD_TIME <= ${endDate} GROUP BY og.GOODS_ID, og.GOODS_NAME ORDER BY SALES_COUNT DESC LIMIT ${limit}

sql.name: getUserStatistics
sql.source: SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_USERS, SUM(CASE WHEN CREATE_TIME >= ${todayStart} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS NEW_USERS_TODAY, SUM(CASE WHEN CREATE_TIME >= ${weekStart} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS NEW_USERS_THIS_WEEK, SUM(CASE WHEN CREATE_TIME >= ${monthStart} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS NEW_USERS_THIS_MONTH FROM nop_auth_user WHERE USER_TYPE = 1 AND CAST(DEL_FLAG AS INT) = 0 AND CREATE_TIME >= ${startDate} AND CREATE_TIME <= ${endDate}

sql.name: getDashboardGmv
sql.source: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(ACTUAL_PRICE), 0) AS GMV, COUNT(*) AS ORDER_COUNT, COUNT(DISTINCT USER_ID) AS PAID_USER_COUNT, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT f.USER_ID) FROM litemall_footprint f WHERE CAST(f.DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND f.ADD_TIME >= ${startDate} AND f.ADD_TIME <= ${endDate}) AS UV, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM litemall_aftersale a WHERE CAST(a.DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND CAST(a.STATUS AS INT) = 3 AND a.ADD_TIME >= ${startDate} AND a.ADD_TIME <= ${endDate}) AS RETURN_COUNT FROM litemall_order WHERE CAST(DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND CAST(ORDER_STATUS AS INT) >= 201 AND PAY_TIME >= ${startDate} AND PAY_TIME <= ${endDate}

sql.name: getPaidOrderPoints
getStockWarningList
sql.source: SELECT g.ID AS GOODS_ID, g.NAME AS GOODS_NAME, COALESCE(SUM(p.NUMBER), 0) AS TOTAL_STOCK FROM litemall_goods g LEFT JOIN litemall_goods_product p ON p.GOODS_ID = g.ID AND CAST(p.DELETED AS INT) = 0 WHERE CAST(g.DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND CAST(g.IS_ON_SALE AS INT) = 1 GROUP BY g.ID, g.NAME HAVING COALESCE(SUM(p.NUMBER), 0) <= ${threshold} ORDER BY TOTAL_STOCK ASC LIMIT ${limit}
